title: Luffy on Amazon Lily: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's wrong, Enishida? Rushing about like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: EHHHHH!!!!? At a time like this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Ahh... but I'm in a hurry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't know what medicine to prescribe....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Lady Hebitime looks like she's suff- Fering...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She won't even take any food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do you know what it is....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: has been a great deal of the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hebihime... monkey D. Luffy came with me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: No illness could keep me down...!!
